---
title: "Privacy Policy"
description: "How StudyStats handles personal information collected via this website."
pagetitle: "Privacy Policy — StudyStats"
format: html
---

*Last updated: May 2026*

StudyStats ("we", "our") respects your privacy. This page explains what
information we collect through **study-stats.com**, why we collect it, and the
choices you have.

## Information we collect

- **Information you provide**: name, email, phone number and project details
  submitted via the contact form or email.
- **Automatically collected**: anonymised usage data (pages visited, device
  type, country) via Google Analytics 4 and, where consent is given, Google
  Ads conversion tracking.
- **Cookies**: a cookie-consent banner allows you to accept or reject
  non-essential cookies.

## How we use it

- To respond to your enquiry and deliver agreed services.
- To improve the website (aggregate analytics only).
- To measure the effectiveness of advertising campaigns.

We **do not** sell or share personal information with third parties for
marketing purposes.

## Lawful basis (POPIA / GDPR)

We process personal information on the basis of your consent (form submissions,
analytics) and legitimate interest (responding to direct enquiries). You may
withdraw consent at any time.

## Data retention

Enquiry emails are retained for 24 months. Analytics data is retained for the
minimum period configured in Google Analytics (currently 14 months).

## Your rights

You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal
information. Contact us at
[studystatsbb@gmail.com](mailto:studystatsbb@gmail.com).

## Third-party services

- **Google Analytics 4** — usage analytics
- **Google Ads** (when active) — conversion measurement
- **Formspree** — contact form delivery
- **GitHub Pages** — website hosting

## Contact

Questions about this policy: [studystatsbb@gmail.com](mailto:studystatsbb@gmail.com).
